Component of current liabilities, not the total.

Semantically the best match for short-term debt/current borrowings, but values are blank in preview; label may exist historically.

variables.notes: Best semantic match for current debt excluding leases, but confidence is limited because preview values are blank and nearby 'Other financial liabilities' could also capture current borrowings. Excluded lease-related rows per rule.

Component/subline, not total PPE.

candidates.why: Lease-related gross asset; not preferred for baseline PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Purchases of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Cash flow capex line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total net tangible assets line as the closest PPE total; excluded right-of-use assets and component sublines.
